chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No. 38 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case For hearing of Main Case 08.05.2025 Mr. Ghous Bakhsh Kehri, Special Prosecutor NAB Ms. Sadaf Khokhar, Member Inspection Team-II.-.-.-.-.-. Ms. Sadaf Khokhar, MIT-II has informed that a Suo Moto Reference has been made for transfer of three References and one bail application pending in the Accountability Court-II, Hyderabad to the Accountability Court-I, Hyderabad as the Accountability Court-II is lying vacant. We see no impediment in transferring those cases as the Accountability Court-II Hyderabad is lying vacant. Let three references and one bail application be transferred from docket of the Accountability Court-II, Hyderabad to the Accountability Court-I, Hyderabad for disposal according to law. Transfer application stand disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
